What happened: As of 2026-04-02, retrieved authoritative sources identify the current authoritative publications as IR 8413. According to IR 8413, Status Report on the Third Round of the NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography Standardization Process, the new publickey cryptography standards will specify additional digital signature, public-key encryption, and key-establishment algorithms to augment Federal Information Processin. What happened: As of 2026-04-02, retrieved authoritative sources identify the current authoritative publications as IR 8413.
